ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the strategy */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the strategy was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year and type of training/testing (Train/Test) */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe Ratio of the investment strategy */,
  "bh_sharpe" REAL /* Sharpe Ratio for Buy and Hold strategy */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the investment strategy */,
  "bh_returns" REAL /* Buy and Hold returns percentage */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown experienced */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance metric period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance metric period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_records" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy used for this trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_amount" REAL /* Amount of capital involved in the trade */,
  "trade_result" REAL /* Result of the trade (e.g., profit or loss) */,
  "position_size" REAL /* Size of the position */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_records_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed */,
  "annual_returns" REAL /* Annual returns of the investment strategy */,
  "risk_adjusted_returns" REAL /* Risk-adjusted returns of the investment strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Predicted Sharpe Ratio of the investment strategy */,
  "predicted_return_percentage" REAL /* Predicted return percentage of the investment strategy */,
  "predicted_max_drawdown" REAL /* Predicted maximum drawdown of the investment strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_strategy_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_strategy_permissions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_strategy_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_types" (
  "strategy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy type */,
  "strategy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the strategy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategy_types" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "strategy_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id", "strategy_type_id")
)
